text:
Created attachment 143769
Update to 0.9.7 release

- Update to 0.9.7 release
- Strip shared objects
- Do not build and install tests


Build tested with portlint and poudriere testport on amd64 for head, stable/10,
releng/9.2, releng/8.4. Runtime tested in combination with devel/hg-git on
stable/10 amd64.

Thanks!
